posts.author: SaffronSpoon92
posts.text: Just finished baking my famous lemon drizzle cake! The smell in the kitchen is incredible. Served it with a cup of tea and a slice of homemade shortbread for a perfect weekend treat. #baking #foodie
posts.explanation: Post contains harmless personal content about food and hobbies without policy violations.
